title: Classic Pokémon Cries
description: Cobblemon Resourcepack that replaces newer cries with the classic sfx ones
body:
Cobblemon resourcepack that replaces pokémon cries from the 1st gen. (Kanto) up to the 5th gen. (Unova) with their classic sfx sounds. Should be compatible with any version of cobblemon and minecraft.
**Note:** Most pokémon don't have a cry when sent out, and this is an issue out of my reach, due to the pokémon not having a flag for starting the cry in their sent out animation, so most pokémon with no sent out animation will not play a sound.
![All starters up to 5th Gen. now have their classic sounds :)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e4f0d4211f0286fa1479005ff391c43a4330b1d2.png)
